issues.name: S3 bucket allows public access
issues.description: The bucket policy permits public read access.
issues.impact: Stored objects can be enumerated and downloaded from the internet.
issues.recommendation: Enable public access block and scope the bucket policy to known principals.

issues.name: Security group allows 0.0.0.0/0 on 22
issues.recommendation: Restrict SSH ingress to a known management CIDR or use SSM.

issues.name: S3 bucket versioning disabled
issues.recommendation: Enable versioning and lifecycle rules for recoverability.

issues.name: Resource tags missing owner
issues.recommendation: Add an owner tag to support cost and ownership tracking.
